narrative:
Trenton Twp township has 1,858 registered voters, with 46.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
